asset_name: Battle HUD Bars — HP, round, deck, and cost
shared_properties: Uses the project core palette copy #D4AF37/#2B1B17/#00FFFF.
Groups player HP, enemy HP, round timer, deck count, and cost dots inside one overlay sheet.
Panel design stays readable over the maroon hall with navy fill and gold trim.
differences: This file carries neutral and damage-flash states for the HUD shell.
Damage-flash state adds crimson emphasis to the active HP bar frame without changing layout coordinates.

reference_images.label: duel_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Ground top-edge HUD density and spacing.

reference_images.label: source_gdd
reference_images.purpose: Ground HP bar sizes, round timer dimensions, deck counter size, and cost-dot strip placement.

bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load assets/art/reflect_academy/trial_5/ui_battle_hud_bars_520x160.png with AssetServer during Loading state and store the handle under ui_battle_hud_bars_520x160.
runtime_notes: Create a 2-column TextureAtlasLayout for neutral and damage-flash states.
Anchor the player block to x=20 y=900 and the enemy block to x=1380 y=40 via child nodes or sliced regions.
Keep numeric text and fill bars as child entities so the shell sprite remains reusable.

context.usage: Persistent battle overlay for HP, round, deck, and cost readouts through the full duel loop.

shape.silhouette: HUD shell with two HP bar wells, a central round timer capsule, a deck counter badge, and a cost-dot rail.

acceptance_criteria: State sheet canvas is exactly 1040x160 px with two 520x160 states.
Both HP wells measure exactly 200x20 px and preserve 2 px gold frame thickness.
Round timer capsule measures exactly 80x30 px and remains centered inside the local HUD canvas.
